{{Quote|There's something wrong in there. I feel…darkness…evil…the dark side.|Kara|<ref name="Polyhedron 104">{{PolyhedronCite|104|Dangers from the Dark Side: Villains for the Star Wars: New Republic Campaign, Part Two}}</ref>}}
'''Kara''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] medic training in the ways of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. She served on board the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] picket ship, which discovered the only remaining [[Outrider-class cruiser|''Outrider''-class cruiser]] belonging to the [[Order of the Silver Jedi]]. She accompanied [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Korsu]] and his group when they boarded the cruiser and informed the captain that she felt [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|the dark side]] aboard. Immediately after saying this, the [[Force vampire|Force Vampire]] barreled through the group, grabbed onto her, and drained her of her life.<ref name="Polyhedron 104" />
